task_title: HTML scaffold — three-screen structure + CSS token definitions + font imports
action: Created index.html with three screen containers, all CSS design tokens, Google Fonts imports, reset styles, and screen visibility classes
notes: Code Quality Reviewer recommended adding display=swap to Google Fonts URL — deferred to Task 10 integration

task_title: CSS styling — Anthropic design tokens, layout, typography, animations
action: Added all component CSS styles to index.html: container, buttons, option cards, progress bar, toast, animations, screen backgrounds. Fixed btn-secondary padding (14px→16px) and progress-track width (100%) after spec review.
notes: Code Quality Reviewer flagged missing :focus-visible states on buttons — deferred to Task 10 integration. Color contrast on .btn-secondary noted.

task_title: Welcome screen — FBTI logo, title, tagline, CTA button
action: Populated welcome screen with logo img, h1 title, tagline p, CTA button. Added showScreen() helper and btn-start click handler. Fixed tagline font-size 18px→16px after spec review.

task_title: Quiz screen — progress bar, question display, option buttons, question transition
action: Built quiz screen HTML, CSS transitions, showQuestion/selectOption JS. Added progress bar, option cards, slide animations. CQR noted: bounds check recommendation, progress bar alignment, textContent vs innerHTML for XSS safety — deferred to Task 10.
notes: CQR recommendations: add bounds check to showQuestion, align progress bar/label, use textContent for option text. Deferred to Task 10.

task_title: Quiz data — embed all 16 questions, 16 type descriptions, 16 SVG avatars
action: Embedded 16 questions, 16 type descriptions, and 16 SVG avatars in index.html. CQR noted duplicate SVG for SWNP/SWTU — deferred to Task 10.
notes: CQR: duplicate SVG for SWNP and SWTU (byte-for-byte identical). Recommendation to give them distinct visuals. Deferred to Task 10.

task_title: Quiz state machine — answer collection, scoring algorithm, navigation
action: Implemented calculateType scoring (4 dimensions), showResult, renderResult with URL pushState, DOMContentLoaded URL parsing. Fixed empty result screen HTML and made renderResult defensive. CQR: retake button missing, Dim2 comment clarification, array validation — deferred to Task 10.
notes: CQR: add retake button, add answers.length guard in calculateType, clarify Dim2 B=-0.5 comment. Deferred to Task 10.

task_title: Result screen — avatar, type code, name, tagline, share buttons
action: Built full result screen HTML with avatar container, type code, name, tagline, share buttons, retake button. Added copyLink, retakeQuiz, showToast, generateShareImage stub. CQR: clipboard fallback, WCAG contrast, aria-labels — deferred to Task 10.
notes: CQR: clipboard fallback for non-HTTPS, white-on-accent contrast fails WCAG AA, aria-labels missing on buttons, generateShareImage stub toast never resolves.

task_title: URL sharing — parse ?type= on load, pushState on result, copy link
action: URL sharing already implemented in Task 6. Verified: DOMContentLoaded URL parsing, renderResult pushState, copyLink clipboard. No new code required.
notes: Task 8 is verification only — no new code. URL parsing and pushState already in Task 6.

task_title: Image sharing — Canvas-based 900×1200 PNG with QR code
action: Implemented Canvas-based share image generation with QRCode.js CDN. Added error handling: logo/avatar timeout via Promise.race, QRCode undefined check, QR error flow with qrOk flag early return. 3 iterations needed due to CQR failures.
notes: CQR took 3 iterations. Issues: missing timeout/err handling, QR error flow return bug, logo drawImage unconditional. All fixed.

action: Added meta tags, focus-visible states, textContent for options, calculateType guard, SWTU distinct SVG, clipboard execCommand fallback. All CQR deferred items resolved.
